banned_patterns.name: hot_news
banned_patterns.pattern: ^.*(刚刚|重磅|突发|震惊|炸裂).*(发布|上线|推出|宣布).*$

banned_patterns.name: predictions
banned_patterns.pattern: ^.*(十大|预测|展望|趋势).*\d{4}年|来年.*趋势|必火.*$

banned_patterns.name: generic_overview
banned_patterns.pattern: ^.*(一文读懂|全面解读|快速入门|分钟学会|一张图读懂).*$

banned_patterns.name: anxiety_marketing
banned_patterns.pattern: ^.*(AI取代.*职业|将被淘汰|即将消失|逆天|颠覆认知|太卷了).*$

banned_patterns.name: translation_fluff
banned_patterns.pattern: ^.*(让我们深入|值得注意的是|本文将探讨|翻译自).*$

banned_patterns.name: tool_list
banned_patterns.pattern: ^.*(工具推荐|必备神器|10款.*工具|超级好用.*工具).*$

banned_patterns.name: tutorial_fluff
banned_patterns.pattern: ^.*(从零开始|新手必看|入门教程|上手指南|小白.*必学).*$

banned_patterns.name: ai_generated
banned_patterns.pattern: ^.*(首先|其次|最后|总之).{0,15}(我们可以看到|研究表明).*$

banned_patterns.name: clickbait
banned_patterns.pattern: ^.*(竟然|居然|万万没想到|99%的人都不知道|绝了).*$
